subject: Economics
chapter: Indian Economy on the Eve of Independence

remember: Students will be able to recall and list the main features of Indian economy on the eve of independence
Students will be able to identify the key sectors of the Indian economy in 1947
understand: Students will be able to explain the causes of India's poverty and underdevelopment on the eve of independence
Students will be able to describe the role of the British in shaping India's economy
apply: Students will be able to apply the concepts of colonial exploitation to analyze the Indian economy in 1947
Students will be able to use data to compare the economic conditions of India in 1947 with those of other countries
analyze: Students will be able to analyze the impact of colonial policies on India's economic growth and development
Students will be able to evaluate the effectiveness of the British economic policies in India

ncert_objectives: As per NCERT objective 1: To understand the main features of Indian economy on the eve of independence
To analyze the causes of India's poverty and underdevelopment on the eve of independence
To describe the role of the British in shaping India's economy
board_exam_objectives: To describe the main features of the Indian economy on the eve of independence
To explain the causes of India's poverty and underdevelopment on the eve of independence
To analyze the impact of colonial policies on India's economic growth and development
